description: Config-driven market regime rules. These rules summarize context and do not mutate core graph scores in v0.6.

regimes.name: Risk-Off
regimes.description: Risk appetite is weak or volatility pressure is high.

regimes.name: Liquidity Easing
regimes.description: Dollar liquidity is supportive while real-rate pressure is not dominant.

regimes.name: China Credit Impulse
regimes.description: China credit or liquidity conditions are improving enough to matter for China-linked ponds.

regimes.name: Crypto Liquidity Expansion
regimes.description: Stablecoin liquidity and BTC ETF flow are both supportive.

regimes.name: Gold Defensive Bid
regimes.description: Geopolitical risk news is strong enough to support defensive demand for gold.
